name: open
why: Start session, load vault context, surface open threads and priorities

name: close
why: End session, commit memory, write daily note + SESSION_LOG entry

name: brief
why: Generate a structured delegation brief for a sub-agent

name: decide
why: Run a decision through the 12-lens evaluation framework

name: setup
why: First-run interview that configures Titus for a new user

name: semantic-search
why: Vault search by meaning via local embeddings

name: caddy-enroll
why: Add a new skill to Caddy's index so it can be surfaced by prompt match

name: system-check
why: Audit Titus install — verifies kernel, skills, hooks, daemons, vault, semantic search. Reports green/yellow/red.

name: skill-audit
why: List skills by usage, flag dead ones for retirement, detect Caddy trigger mismatches, surface missing skills.

name: diagnose
why: Walk the seven-layer Titus stack to identify which layer is causing an issue. Caddy pattern applied to debugging.
